title: Minecraft Is Somehow a Computer Now #minecraft #linux #coding
summary: A video from Better Stack demonstrates that Minecraft has been configured or extended to function as a working computer. The demonstration involves using Minecraft with Linux and coding to achieve computational functionality within the game environment.
